meta.name: Simple
meta.description: 4-quadrant sampler world. UR: kick density (Y) + hihat density (X) @ 111 BPM. UL: same drum mirror @ 55.5 BPM (hihat density mirrored toward left edge) with Portal-style granular send FX (PitchShift+Delay+Filter+Reverb) — X=pitch/delay-time macro, Y=grain window/feedback/filter/reverb macro, send amount scales with distance from UL center. BL: charlie sample with lowpass filter. BR: rain sample with mirrored lowpass filter. BL+BR crossfade and extend up into UL/UR via 2D audibility rectangles.
